role: This directory contains the architectural and coding standard rulebooks that govern the structure and conventions of the ArchSpine project.
responsibility: Collectively, these files define and enforce the layered module architecture, import boundaries, naming conventions, and coding standards for the entire ArchSpine monorepo, ensuring consistency and maintainability across all contributions.

children.role: Architectural constraint rulebook for the ArchSpine project's layered module structure
Defines naming conventions and coding standards for the ArchSpine monorepo codebase.
